message:
feat(vt): charset wiring + DECOM cursor homing + 6 new conformance fixtures

Complete VirtualTerminal charset support: add EscapeCharset parse state,
route ESC (/)/*)/+ to charset designator handler, add SO/SI (Shift
Out/In), SS2/SS3 (Single Shift), LS2/LS3 (Locking Shift) in escape
handler.

Add DECOM cursor homing to DecSet/DecRst handlers in both
conformance_fixtures and scroll_region_fixtures CoreHarness: enabling
DECOM homes cursor to scroll region top, disabling homes to (0,0).
Fix cha_not_affected_by_decom fixture expected values to account for
DECOM homing.

Add 6 new VT conformance fixtures:
- irm_push_off_right_edge: IRM insert pushes chars off screen
- irm_wide_char_insert: IRM with wide character shifts by 2
- decstr_resets_insert_mode: soft reset clears IRM
- decstr_clears_decom: soft reset clears DECOM
- decom_off_homes_cursor: DECOM disable homes to (0,0)
- decawm_nowrap_in_scroll_region: DECAWM off within region

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_nowrap_in_scroll_region",
+  "description": "DECAWM disabled within scroll region: cursor stays at right margin, no wrap or scroll",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b323b34721b5b3f376c1b5b323b31484142434445464748494a",
+  "comment": "DECSTBM(2,4), CSI ? 7 l (DECAWM off), CUP(2,1) → row 1 col 0, print ABCDEFGHIJ (10 chars in 10-col terminal). Without wrap, fills row 1 fully, J overwrites at col 9. Cursor stays at (1,9).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 9 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 5, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 6, "char": "G" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 7, "char": "H" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 8, "char": "I" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 9, "char": "J" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_push_off_right_edge",
+  "description": "IRM insert mode pushes rightmost characters off screen edge",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b34681b5b485859",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE (fills 5-col row), CSI 4 h (IRM on), CUP(1,1) home, print XY; inserts XY at col 0-1, shifting ABCDE right, D+E fall off → XYABC; cursor at (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "C" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_wide_char_insert",
+  "description": "IRM insert mode with wide character shifts existing text right by 2 columns",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b34681b5b313b3348e4b8ad",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE, CSI 4 h (IRM on), CUP(1,3) → col 2, insert 中 (U+4E2D, 2-wide). Shifts CDE right by 2 → AB中CDE. Cursor at (0,4) after wide char.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "中" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
